## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (or equivalent: `tsc`, `lint`, `test`)
- [ ] No secrets or real `.env` committed
- [ ] If new **environment variables**: [`.env.example`](.env.example) updated with placeholders
- [ ] If new **canonical area** (integration, major route): [`docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) table updated
- [ ] If **stack/commands** changed: [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md) updated
